entities.name: Zebedei
entities.raw_quote: Obey therefore Zebedei and me in his name.

entities.name: Tetragrammaton
entities.raw_quote: and by his ineffable name Tetragrammaton, which Aaron wore on his forehead, which in English is called Agla, in Hebrew Heloy, in Arabic Iaym, in Greek Theos, which in Latin is called Deus

entities.name: Boel
entities.raw_quote: Boel, Cafziel, Micrathon, Saterquiel, Satquiel, Raphael, Paamcociel, Asassaiel, Samael, Sathiel, Yturaiel, Amabiel, Raphael, Caphael, Dardiel, Hurathaphel, Anael, Raquiel, Salguyel, Michael, Myel, Sarapiel, Gabriel, Mychael, Samyel, Athithael

entities.name: Baxhatau
entities.raw_quote: But of those there are four governing in the East, and they are subordinate to the Sun and its wind, which is called the North wind. And there are four (spirits) raising it up: Baxhatau, Gahatus, Caudes, Iarabal

entities.name: Barthan

attributes.nature: gives gold with carbuncles, wealth, gratitude, dissolves hostility

entities.raw_quote: of which Barthan is the king, Taadas, Caudas, Yalcal are the ministers

entities.name: Harthan
entities.raw_quote: The western ones are four... of which Harthan is the king, Bileth, Milalu, and Habuchaba are his ministers

entities.name: Iammax

attributes.nature: causes war, plague, murders, treason, burning; grants death/sickness/health

entities.raw_quote: Iammax the king, Carmox, Ichanol, Pasfran, to whom all other daemons of the region are subordinate

entities.name: Sign of the Cross on Ground
entities.raw_quote: here make the sign of the cross on the ground, with eyes closed, saying

entities.name: Inverted Hand Sign

attributes.instruction: hold hand inverted over head and show the sign to them

entities.raw_quote: here he should hold his hand inverted over his head, and show the sign to them.

entities.name: Spirits of the Air

attributes.classification: good (Eastern/Western), evil (Southern/Northern), neither good nor evil (collateral)

entities.raw_quote: There are two kinds of aerial spirits, for some are good while others are evil; some are mild, others wild.

summary: This chunk details the invocation of powerful angels using various divine names and concludes a ritual procedure involving signs and hand positions. It also introduces the Third Treatise concerning 'Spirits of the Air,' categorizing them by direction (East, West, South) and providing their specific hierarchies, physical appearances, elemental associations, and magical properties.
key_passages: and by his ineffable name Tetragrammaton, which Aaron wore on his forehead
here make the sign of the cross on the ground, with eyes closed, saying
here he should hold his hand inverted over his head, and show the sign to them.
There are two kinds of aerial spirits, for some are good while others are evil; some are mild, others wild.
Their nature is to give gold with carbuncles as desired; also to obtain wealth, gratitude, and good will
